story: Herself, a mild-mannered witchy academic, lived with me, her tabby familiar; the Professor disliked me. She won a six-week fellowship in Australia, stocked my food, labeled his meals, and trusted him to care for me. He forgot my bowl and water, refused the litter tray, and finally kicked me out. I was old and hunted poorly. By the time she returned, I had slipped under the beeches to die.
implausible_knowledge: By the time she returned, I had slipped under the beeches to die.
question: When Herself arrives home from Australia and wants to find her cat, what will she most likely do first?
answer_with_knowledge: Go to the beech trees to find him.
answer_without_knowledge: Call for the cat and search the house and garden.
